CustomField.formula: IF( Somme_commissions__c >= Convention__r.Montant_declenchement_palier4__c, Somme_commissions__c * Convention__r.Pourcentage_remuneration_palier4__c, IF( Somme_commissions__c >= Convention__r.Montant_declenchement_palier3__c, Somme_commissions__c * Convention__r.Pourcentage_remuneration_palier3__c, IF( Somme_commissions__c >= Convention__r.Montant_declenchement_palier2__c, Somme_commissions__c * Convention__r.Pourcentage_remuneration_palier2__c, IF( Somme_commissions__c >= Convention__r.Montant_declenchement_palier1__c, Somme_commissions__c * Convention__r.Pourcentage_remuneration_palier1__c, 0 ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Montant
